name: GamCare — National Gambling Helpline
description: Free, confidential advice and support for anyone affected by gambling.
subtitle: Free, confidential · 24/7

name: Samaritans
description: Someone to talk to, whatever you're going through.
subtitle: Free · 24/7

name: NHS 111
description: Get urgent medical help or mental health advice when you need it.
subtitle: Free · 24/7

name: BeGambleAware
description: Information, advice, and support for safer gambling.
subtitle: Free resources

name: NHS Talking Therapies
description: Free NHS psychological therapies for anxiety, depression, and addiction.
subtitle: Self-referral available

name: Gamblers Anonymous UK
description: Peer-led fellowship meetings for people who want to stop gambling.
subtitle: Meetings across the UK

name: Gordon Moody Association
description: Residential treatment and online support for gambling addiction.
subtitle: Specialist addiction charity

name: Expert Self Exclusion
description: Coaching and practical support to block gambling access and rebuild habits.
subtitle: Recovery coaching

name: Gambling with Lives
description: Support for families and individuals affected by gambling harm.
subtitle: Peer support & advocacy

name: Block access & money
description: GAMSTOP, bank gambling blocks, and spending delays in the app.
subtitle: Cut off access, not willpower
